name: protobuf
description: Google's language-neutral, platform-neutral, extensible mechanism for serializing structured data.
Based off of protobuf port version 6.33.4 found in microsoft's vcpkg registry
Customized for Python 3.12 compatibility, as well as a pyext feature for exporting

libprotoc.description: Build the libprotoc compiler library for target builds.

zlib.description: ZLib based features like Gzip streams
